steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
Use the two points from the table, $(-12,-45)$ and $(6,45)$:
$$m=\frac{45-(-45)}{6-(-12)}=\frac{90}{18}=5$$

steps.title: Find the equation
steps.content:
Use $y=mx+b$ with $m=5$ and the point $(6,45)$:
$$45=5(6)+b$$
$$b=15$$
So the equation is $y=5x+15$.

steps.title: Evaluate the requested value
steps.content:
The point is $(\frac{1}{4},a)$, so substitute $x=\frac{1}{4}$:
$$a=5\cdot\frac{1}{4}+15=\frac{5}{4}+15=16.25$$
The answer is 16.25.
